title: Jiwaji University UG Time Table 2026 OUT

detail.title: Jiwaji University UG Time Table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: Jiwaji University UG Time Table 2026 is out for BA, B.Com, B.Sc, BBA, BCA, BTM and other undergraduate March 2026 main exams. Students can check 2nd year and 3rd year NEP exam schedules, subject-wise dates, and download the official PDF from jiwaji.edu.

sections.heading: Jiwaji University UG Time Table 2026 OUT

content.text: Jiwaji University has officially released the UG Time Table 2026 for various undergraduate courses including BA, B.Com, B.Sc, B.Sc (Home Science), BBA, BCA and BTM for the March 2026 main examinations. The timetables cover 2nd year and 3rd year students under NEP (New Education Policy) for regular, private, ex and supplementary candidates. Students can check the complete exam schedule on the official website - https://jiwaji.edu. To download the timetable, candidates need to visit the site and access the direct PDF links provided for their respective year and course.
Always verify the exact dates, timings, and instructions mentioned in the official document. In case of any discrepancy, contact the university examination department immediately.
Download the Jiwaji University UG Time Table 2026 PDF here.

links.text: Download the Jiwaji University UG Time Table 2026 PDF here.

sections.heading: Jiwaji University UG Time Table 2026 Overview

content.text: Jiwaji University Gwalior has announced the undergraduate main examination schedule for March 2026. The timetables include theory exams for Ist, IInd and IIIrd year students in annual and NEP schemes. Students appearing for BA, B.Com, B.Sc, BBA, BCA, BTM and related programs can now access their exam dates.

rows: BA, B.Com, B.Sc, B.Sc (Home Sc.), BBA, BCA, BTM and others
IInd Year & IIIrd Year (Some Ist Year Certificate)

sections.heading: Jiwaji University UG Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: Jiwaji University has released detailed subject-wise exam schedules for undergraduate courses under the March 2026 session. The timetables cover foundation courses, major papers and vocational subjects for regular, private, ex-students and supplementary candidates. Students are advised to note the exact date, day, and timing for each paper.

rows: UG - BA, B.Com, B.Sc, B.Sc (Home Sc.), BBA, BCA, BTM IInd Year Diploma
UG - BA, B.Com, B.Sc, B.Sc (Home Sc.), BBA, BCA & BTM IIIrd Year Degree Main Exam
UG - B.T.M. IIIrd Year Degree Exam
Partially Chance - B.Sc IIIrd Year (Physics Paper)

sections.heading: How to Download Jiwaji University UG Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the Jiwaji University UG Time Table 2026 from the official university website. The process is simple and requires only a few clicks. Follow the steps below to access your exam schedule without any hassle.

items: Visit the official Jiwaji University website at https://jiwaji.edu.
Navigate to the Information Corner or Timetable section from the main menu.
Locate the link for UG Time Table March 2026 or the relevant course and year.
Click on the desired timetable PDF link (for example, IIIrd Year or IInd Year NEP).
The PDF will open in a new tab. Review the complete schedule carefully.
Click the download icon or use Ctrl + S (Command + S on Mac) to save the file on your device.
Take a clear printout of the timetable for daily reference during exam preparation.

content.text: Students should thoroughly check the official timetable for any updates or changes and keep a printed copy handy for effective exam planning.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Jiwaji University UG Time Table 2026

content.text: The official Jiwaji University UG Time Table 2026 PDF contains all essential information required for smooth exam preparation. Students will find clear details about their specific papers and examination guidelines.

items: Course name and year (IInd Year / IIIrd Year)
Examination name - Main Exam March 2026
Date and day of each theory paper
Timings of the examination (morning or afternoon session)
Subject code and paper title
Scheme - NEP New Scheme or Annual System
Category of students (Regular, Private, Ex, Suppl. II Chance)
Important notes and instructions for candidates
Foundation course details where applicable
